name: Dean Spotlight Floor Lamp Black/Brass: Touch Sensor, Adjustable Heads - Threshold™
description:
Add simple, stylish lighting to your home decor with the Dean Spotlight Floor Lamp (Includes LED Light Bulb) from Threshold™. This black floor lamp features four cylindrical shades in a brass finish for a contemporary look. Easy to light up with the touch-activated sensor, this floor lamp uses an electric outlet power source and makes a great pick for your living room, bedroom or any other space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
